properties.description: Overall quality and reliability of the service experience.
Warmth, politeness, and helpfulness of staff interactions.
Taste, freshness, and overall quality of the food.
Whether the price feels justified by the overall experience.
Satisfaction with portion size and fullness provided.
Perceived cleanliness of the restaurant and dining environment.
How quickly food, service, or seating is provided.
Atmosphere, mood, and overall feel of the space.
How suitable the restaurant feels for groups, families, or friends.
How appropriate the restaurant feels for a date or romantic outing.
Signals that customers want to come back again.
Quality and appeal of the restaurant's view or scenery.
Signals that the experience feels premium, upscale, or refined.
How easy and smooth the reservation process feels.
